integrity.description: The SQL file contains valid SQL statements
integrity.visual_evidence: The file '/home/ga/cleanup_queries.sql' contains actual SQL DELETE syntax (e.g., DELETE FROM table WHERE id IN (...)), not just a copy-paste of the task description.

integrity.description: The agent only deleted the specified anomalous records
integrity.visual_evidence: The SQL statements or GUI actions specifically target the IDs mentioned (60-62, 413-414, 2241-2243) and do not drop tables or delete all records.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires removing specific injected anomalies from the Chinook database (chinook.odb). The anomalies are: Customer IDs 60, 61, 62; Invoice IDs 413, 414; and InvoiceLine IDs 2241, 2242, 2243. The agent must execute DELETE statements to remove these records and save the exact SQL statements used to /home/ga/cleanup_queries.sql. The original database has 59 customers, 412 invoices, and 2240 invoice lines. The agent must also save the database file after modifications.
